body: ## [1.5.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.5.0...v1.5.1) (2016-05-17) ### Bug Fixes * **numericRefinementList:** Correctly apply active class ([7cca9a4](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/7cca9a4)), closes [#1010](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1010)
